methods.name: icetcore.sample.实时行情订阅.APIEvent.onconnected
documentation: 连线成功通知apitype="quoteapi"是行情api的通知，"tradeapi"是交易通知

methods.name: icetcore.sample.实时行情订阅.APIEvent.onATM
documentation: subATM订阅的ATM合约信息，动态推送期权的ATM平值,OTM-1C虚值一档认购，OTM-1P虚值一档认沽，和认购期权合约列表

variables.name: icetcore.sample.vannasampple.Vanna
documentation: 此处设定Vanna对应期权总持仓分析的$*0.01,如当前设定当期权总持仓分析的达到900W的时候停止加仓

methods.name: icetcore.sample.sampple.APIEvent.onconnected
documentation: 连线成功通知apitype="quoteapi"是行情api的通知，"tradeapi"是交易通知

methods.name: icetcore.sample.sampple.APIEvent.onATM
documentation: subATM订阅的ATM合约信息，动态推送期权的ATM平值,OTM-1C虚值一档认购，OTM-1P虚值一档认沽，和认购期权合约列表

methods.name: icetcore.sample.sampple.APIEvent.onaccountlist
documentation: 资金账户列表，当有资金账户登出或者登入时

methods.name: icetcore.sample.sampple.APIEvent.onorderreportreset
documentation: 账户登出登入时委托资料需要清理通知

methods.name: icetcore.sample.sampple.APIEvent.oncombposition
documentation: 账户组合持仓信息更新

methods.name: icetcore.sample.sampple.APIEvent.oncombinationorder
documentation: 账户组合指令信息更新

methods.name: icetcore.api.TradeAPI.getorderinfo
documentation: 获取新增委托单最新信息和状态

methods.name: icetcore.api.TradeAPI.getaccmargin
documentation: 获取指定账户的资金信息

methods.name: icetcore.api.TradeAPI.getposition
documentation: 获取指定子账户的持仓信息

methods.name: icetcore.api.TradeAPI.getcombposition
documentation: 获取指定账户的组合持仓

methods.name: icetcore.api.TradeAPI.subcombposition
documentation: 订阅组合持仓信息更新

methods.name: icetcore.api.TradeAPI.unsubcombposition
documentation: 解订组合持仓信息更新

methods.name: icetcore.api.TradeAPI.getcombinationorder
documentation: 获取指定账户的组合报单记录

methods.name: icetcore.api.TradeAPI.getfilledreport
documentation: 获取当日所有成交委托

methods.name: icetcore.api.TradeAPI.getdetailfilledreport
documentation: 获取当日所有成交委托明细

methods.name: icetcore.api.TradeAPI.getreportbyid
documentation: 根据内部报单编号获取对应的委托单信息

methods.name: icetcore.api.QuoteAPI.gettradeingdays
documentation: 获取合约的剩余交易日

methods.name: icetcore.api.QuoteAPI.gettradeingdate
documentation: 获取合约的指定日期段内的交易日列表

methods.name: icetcore.api.QuoteAPI.getallsymbol
documentation: 获取当前最新所有合约，只包含合约，不包含合约信息
当symboltype和exchange均不带入参数默认为空时，获取所有合约

methods.name: icetcore.api.QuoteAPI.get_u_futuresymbol
documentation: 获取合成期货合约列表

methods.name: icetcore.api.QuoteAPI.isholiday
documentation: 指定时间，对应合约是否为假日

methods.name: icetcore.api.QuoteAPI.isunderlying
documentation: 指定合约是否为标的合约
